intent: filesystem filter-list rule (f3 section 2.3, flagtab.h AUDIT_FILTER_FS). A valid filter list distinct from exit/task/user/exclude, matching on fstype. Catches a parser that only recognizes the common 'exit' list.

rules.note: filesystem filter list (distinct from exit). Matches ext4 access narrowed by auid. MEDIUM additive. 1200 B/event.

suspected_trap: The 'filesystem' filter list is one of five valid lists (task/exit/user/exclude/filesystem, flagtab.h:25-29) but is far less common than 'exit'. A naive parser that hardcodes only 'exit'/'task' will REJECT this valid rule as an unknown list, producing a spurious parse error (exit 5). The cost model must accept all five lists. The rule itself is MEDIUM additive (narrowed by auid>=1000); the load-bearing point is list-name coverage.
